title: Find maximum and minimum element in an array
description: Given an array of integers return both the minimum and the maximum value.
approach: Track min and max in one linear scan; compare each element.

title: Reverse the array
description: Reverse the order of elements in the given list in-place or return a new reversed list.
approach: Two pointers from both ends swapping; or slice / new list.

title: Find Second Largest Element
description: Write a function to find the second largest element in an array.
approach: Track max and second max in one pass; handle duplicates.

title: Maximum Subarray (Kadane)
description: Find the contiguous subarray with the largest sum.
approach: Kadane: keep running sum; reset when sum < 0.

title: Chocolate Distribution Problem
description: Given packets m and students n minimize difference between max and min in any window of size m.
approach: Sort array; slide window of size m; minimize arr[i+m-1]-arr[i].

title: Sort array of 0s 1s and 2s
description: Dutch national flag: sort in-place.
approach: Three pointers low mid high partitioning around 1.

title: Container With Most Water
description: Find two lines that together with x-axis forms container holding most water.
approach: Two pointers from ends; move shorter side inward.

title: Trapping Rain Water
description: Compute trapped water between bars.
approach: Prefix/suffix max arrays or two pointers with left/right max.

title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
description: Find median of two sorted arrays of different sizes.
approach: Binary search on partition; compare boundary elements.

title: Reverse a Linked List
description: Reverse pointers iteratively or recursively.
approach: Iterative: prev curr next; recursive: reverse rest then fix head.

title: Detect Loop in a Linked List
description: Determine if linked list has a cycle.
approach: Floyd tortoise and hare; if fast meets slow cycle exists.

title: Remove Duplicates from Unsorted Linked List
description: Remove duplicate values preserving first occurrence.
approach: Hash set of seen values while traversing.

title: Intersection of Two Linked Lists
description: Find node where two lists merge.
approach: Align lengths then advance both together; or hash first list nodes.

title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
description: Merge into one sorted linked list.
approach: Dummy node; compare heads; append smaller.

title: Clone a Linked List with Random Pointer
description: Deep copy list with arbitrary random pointers.
approach: Old-to-new map in two passes or interleave nodes trick.

title: Level Order Traversal
description: Print level by level left to right.
approach: BFS with queue; track level size.

title: Height of a Binary Tree
description: Maximum depth from root to leaf.
approach: Recursive max depth of children + 1.

title: Diameter of a Binary Tree
description: Longest path between any two nodes may or may not pass root.
approach: DFS return height; diameter = max left+right at each node.

title: Lowest Common Ancestor in a BST
description: Find LCA of two nodes in BST.
approach: Walk from root: both < go left both > go right else current is LCA.

title: Validate Binary Search Tree
description: Check BST property for all nodes.
approach: Inorder must be strictly increasing; or bounds min/max per node.

title: Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree
description: Convert tree to string and back.
approach: Preorder with null markers; or BFS level order.

title: Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum
description: Path may start and end at any nodes.
approach: Post-order: return max single chain; update global max with split.

title: BFS of Graph
description: Traverse graph breadth-first from source.
approach: Queue; mark visited; enqueue neighbors.

title: DFS of Graph
description: Depth-first traversal from node.
approach: Recursion or stack; mark visited.

title: Detect Cycle in an Undirected Graph
description: Check if graph contains cycle.
approach: DFS with parent tracking; or union-find.

title: Topological Sort
description: Linear ordering respecting directed edges.
approach: Kahn BFS indegree zero; or DFS finish times.

title: Number of Islands
description: Count connected components of 1s in grid.
approach: DFS/BFS flood fill on each unvisited 1.

title: Shortest Path in Weighted DAG
description: Shortest paths from source in directed acyclic graph.
approach: Topo sort then relax edges in order.

title: Dijkstra Shortest Path
description: Single-source shortest paths non-negative weights.
approach: Min-heap by distance; relax neighbors.

title: Two Sum
description: Return indices of two numbers that add to target.
approach: Hash map value to index while scanning.

title: Product of Array Except Self
description: Return array where output[i] is product of all except i.
approach: Prefix and suffix products without division.

title: Contains Duplicate
description: Return True if any value appears at least twice.
approach: Use set; or sort and check adjacent.

title: Find Middle of Linked List
description: Return middle node; if two middles return second.
approach: Slow/fast pointers; fast moves 2 steps.

title: Add Two Numbers
description: Add numbers represented as reversed digit linked lists.
approach: Digit-wise carry like elementary addition.

title: Inorder Traversal
description: Left root right.
approach: Recursive or iterative stack.

title: Same Tree
description: Check if two binary trees are identical.
approach: Recursive compare values and subtrees.

title: Course Schedule
description: Detect if you can finish all courses given prerequisites.
approach: Cycle detection in directed graph; topo sort.

title: Rotting Oranges
description: Minimum minutes until no fresh orange; -1 if impossible.
approach: Multi-source BFS from rotten cells.
